questions.question_text_full: Traditional ways of recreation, such as puppetry, are dying because:

options.text: they do not provide relaxation from stress
they do not get the support of patrons
the performers lack skill and training
the performances are no longer interesting

questions.notes: No answer marked on the page.

questions.question_text_full: Which of the following statements testifies that puppetry was popular in artistic circles?

options.text: People spent a huge sum of money to see puppet shows.
Puppeteers were trained to give performances.
Puppets became more sophisticated in appearance.
Puppetry finds a mention in literature.

questions.notes: No answer marked on the page.
